name: Herbed Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup gluten flour, instant OR whole wheat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the TVP®, boiling water, ketchup, and basil in a large bowl and set aside.
2. Microwave for 2 minutes on high or sauté the onion in olive oil.
3. Add the onions to the rehydrated TVP® mixture and stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Lightly oil a loaf or bread pan and pack the mixture tightly, smoothing the top. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes. If the loaf begins to brown too quickly on top, cover with foil.
5. After removing from the oven, let stand in the pan for 10 minutes. Run a knife around the edges to loosen, then turn the loaf out onto a platter and slice into 16-18 slices.
6. Garnish with lemon slices and sprigs of parsley. The loaf can be served with Tomato Sauce or Mushroom Gravy (see recipes).
Instant gluten flour has a high gluten content and makes a firm, solid loaf.
Per serving: 196 calories; 24g protein; 21g carbohydrates; 4g fat
